### Feature: Session Scheduling Restrictions

**Description:**
Implement restrictions to prevent last-minute changes to scheduled sessions (e.g., no modifications allowed within 24 hours of the event). This helps enforce policies and keeps scheduling reliable.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users cannot edit or delete a session within 24 hours of its scheduled start time.
- Attempting to do so should show a clear error or warning message.
- Admins may override this restriction if needed.

**Benefits:**
- Prevents confusion and last-minute disruptions.
- Aligns with best practices from EA-Manager.
